inputs.label: Approach point (x →)
inputs.businessContext: The value that x approaches to evaluate the limit

businessContext_i18n.en: The value that x approaches to evaluate the limit
businessContext_i18n.tr: Limitin hesaplanması için x'in yaklaştığı değer
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Wert, dem sich x annähert, um den Grenzwert zu berechnen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur que x approche pour évaluer la limite
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor al que se aproxima x para evaluar el límite

inputs.label: Epsilon (small number)
inputs.businessContext: Small increment for numerical approximation of left- and right-hand limits; use e.g., 1e-4 or smaller

businessContext_i18n.en: Small increment for numerical approximation of left- and right-hand limits; use e.g., 1e-4 or smaller
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sol ve sağ limitlerin sayısal yaklaşımı için küçük artış; örn. 1e-4 veya daha küçük kullanın
businessContext_i18n.de: Kleines Inkrement für numerische Approximation von links- und rechtsseitigen Grenzwerten; verwenden Sie z.B. 1e-4 oder kleiner
businessContext_i18n.fr: Petit incrément pour l'approximation numérique des limites à gauche et à droite ; utiliser par ex. 1e-4 ou plus petit
businessContext_i18n.es: Incremento pequeño para la aproximación numérica de límites por izquierda y derecha; use, por ejemplo, 1e-4 o menor

breakdown: Absolute difference between left and right limits
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
